basicInfo.name: Nightmare Daisy
basicInfo.flavor: \"Have you ever seen crimson butterflies light up the night sky? Unlike moths that fly into fire to die, these butterflies become fire and death, then fly back to you.\

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Dancing Fan
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 245% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 2 Allies
 - Grants Damage Resistance. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 245% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Butterfly Flames
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 120% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Burn. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 900% of Magic Attack against targets inflicted with [Burn].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Nimble Steps
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Paralysis Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Paralysis Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity when HP falls to 50% or lower. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]

profile.story:
Daisy's little brother Ace became lord at an early age.
During a tumultuous war on Moonlit Isle, Ace was abducted by enemy forces.
To rescue her brother, Daisy made a pact with a cat yokai, gaining the powers of yin-yang arts, and as a result of this pact her body has taken on feline features.
Eventually, the war ended in victory for Ace, and he turned his focus to governing the domain.
Daisy stood by his side every step of the way.
Daisy wished for her brother to handle the honorable, bright tasks befitting a lord during the day.
But the realities of leadership meant there were always dishonorable, shadowy tasks that needed to be taken care of at night.
To shoulder these burdens, Daisy founded the Moonlight Guards to protect Ace while managing such clandestine affairs.
That is why the locals call her the Night Ruler of Moonlit Isle.
